name: RERA 2016 — Real Estate (Regulation & Development) Act
name_hi: रेरा 2016 — रियल एस्टेट (विनियमन एवं विकास) अधिनियम
regulator: Real Estate Regulatory Authority (state-wise: UP-RERA, MahaRERA, K-RERA, TN-RERA, etc.)
scope: Mandatory for PRIVATE residential / commercial real-estate projects above state threshold (typically: land area > 500 sqm OR apartments > 8 units). Not applicable to central / state PWD works or self-occupied housing.

key_obligations.registration: Project must be registered with the State RERA before any marketing / booking / sale.
key_obligations.escrow_70pct: Promoter must deposit 70% of buyer receipts in a separate RERA-designated escrow account, withdrawable only against architect+engineer+CA-certified construction progress.
key_obligations.carpet_area_definition: All marketing / agreements must quote CARPET AREA (net usable floor area within walls), not super-built-up area.
key_obligations.quarterly_progress_report: QPR uploaded each quarter to the State RERA portal — physical progress %, financial progress, photos, approvals status.
key_obligations.delay_penalty: Interest payable to buyer at SBI MCLR + 2% (effective rate currently ~11%) on the entire amount received, for every month of delay beyond the registered completion date.

description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check private real-estate project workflows against RERA Act 2016 — project registration certificate present, 70% escrow account configured, carpet-area quoting (not super-built-up) in agreements & marketing, Quarterly Progress Report (QPR) generation schedule, and delay-penalty interest accrual at SBI MCLR + 2% on receipts.
description_hi: रेरा अधिनियम 2016 के अनुसार निजी रियल एस्टेट परियोजनाओं की जाँच — परियोजना पंजीकरण, 70% एस्क्रो खाता, कारपेट क्षेत्र, त्रैमासिक प्रगति रिपोर्ट, विलंब पर ब्याज।
